title: Student Study Sprint App
description: An app that creates 25–50 minute distraction-free study sprints with automatic breaks, performance tracking, and focus analytics to improve productivity.

title: Budget-Based Meal Planner
description: A smart planner that generates weekly meal plans based on your budget, dietary preferences, and local grocery prices.

title: AI Resume Improver
description: Upload your resume and get AI-powered suggestions to improve wording, structure, and ATS compatibility instantly.

title: Skill Swap Platform
description: A platform where users can exchange skills instead of money, like teaching coding in exchange for learning design or languages.

title: Local Event Discovery App
description: An app that shows nearby events like workshops, meetups, and college fests based on your interests and location.
